description: Add full options backup import/export and refresh popup UI when JD hydration updates job details.

userStories.title: Deliver options backup import/export and JD hydration refresh
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export and import my full options profile and see popup job cards refresh when JD hydration updates arrive.
acceptanceCriteria: Options page exports versioned JSON containing filterState, resumeImages, textResume, aiConfig, and exportedAt.
Options page imports JSON through preview then confirm flow, rejecting invalid structures without mutating existing config.
Applying import updates chrome.storage.local and IndexedDB resume image storage consistently.
Popup jobs update processing reacts to changes in detail, desc, jdStatus, jdAttempts, and jdLastError so JD hydration refreshes visible cards and overview data.
node --check or equivalent syntax validation passes for modified JavaScript files.
Record manual extension verification steps for import/export and JD hydration refresh.
userStories.notes: Options page now supports full profile export/import with preview-confirm flow and synced IndexedDB resume storage. Popup jobs diffing now reacts to JD hydration field changes so cards and overview refresh without manual navigation. Manual extension verification steps recorded in progress.txt.
